title: Coinbase Gains UK License to Offer Crypto and Traditional Investments
summary: Coinbase has secured a UK authorization allowing it to offer both cryptocurrency and traditional investments. This move enables institutional traders to access perpetual futures and retail customers to trade equities.
body:
Coinbase, one of the largest cryptocurrency exchanges, has received authorization from UK regulators to offer a broader range of financial products. The license allows the platform to provide institutional traders with access to perpetual futures, a type of derivative contract, and enables retail customers to trade equities.

This approval marks a significant step for Coinbase as it expands its services beyond cryptocurrencies. The company now aims to cater to a wider audience, including traditional investors who may be new to crypto. The move is part of a broader strategy to integrate crypto with traditional financial markets.

For everyday investors, this means more options and potentially easier access to both crypto and traditional assets from a single platform. It could also signal a growing acceptance of crypto within mainstream financial services, making it more accessible to retail investors.

Looking ahead, this development could pave the way for other crypto exchanges to seek similar licenses in the UK. Investors should watch for further integration of traditional and crypto assets, which could lead to more innovative financial products and services. Read more → https://www.coindesk.com/business/2026/07/07/coinbase-secures-uk-authorization-to-offer-traditional-investments-alongside-crypto
twitterThread: Coinbase just got the green light in the UK to offer both crypto and traditional investments. Institutional traders can now access perpetual futures, and retail customers can trade equities.
This move means you can manage crypto and stocks from one platform. It's a big step towards blending traditional finance with crypto, making it easier for everyone to invest.

If you're in the UK, keep an eye on Coinbase for new investment options. This could be the start of more integrated financial services. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-07-coinbase-gains-uk-license-to-offer-crypto-and-traditional-investments
standaloneTweet: Coinbase now offers both crypto and traditional investments in the UK. Retail customers can trade equities, and institutional traders can access perpetual futures. A big step for mainstream crypto adoption.
